title: Tri Power Bracelet – Set of 3 Crystal Stack
short_description: A coordinated set of three crystal bracelets in Red Jasper, Howlite and Black Obsidian, built for strength, calm and grounding. Wear the full stack or style each one on its own.
body_html:
Strength, calm and protection in one powerful trio. The Tri Power Bracelet is a coordinated set of three crystal bracelets designed with bold Red Jasper, calming white Howlite and glossy Black Obsidian beads, finished with polished metallic spacers.

Each bracelet carries its own arrangement of the three crystals — one with a balanced colour pattern, one with an evenly mixed design, and one with a bold Red Jasper base and a detailed centre accent. Worn together they read as a considered stack; worn apart, each stands on its own, so you can style them by mood and intention.

Red Jasper is traditionally linked with stability and inner strength, Howlite with patience and relaxation, and Black Obsidian with grounding and protection. Together they represent balanced power — the strength to move forward, the calm to think clearly and the grounding to stay steady.

  • Set of three coordinated crystal bracelets with distinct designs
  • Triple crystal combination — Red Jasper, Howlite and Black Obsidian
  • Flexible slip-on stretch construction — no clasp needed
  • Bold unisex palette of red, white, black and gold
  • Wear together as a stack or separately by intention

Crystal properties are based on traditional beliefs and are not intended as medical claims or guaranteed outcomes.
seo_title: Tri Power Bracelet – Set of 3 Crystal Stack
seo_description: Set of 3 crystal bracelets: Red Jasper, Howlite & Black Obsidian for strength, calm & grounding. Stretch slip-on, unisex, gold-accent. Free ship over ₹499.

metafields.highlights: Set of 3 coordinated crystal bracelets · Red Jasper, Howlite & Black Obsidian beads · Gold-tone metallic spacer detailing · Flexible slip-on stretch fit · Bold unisex red-white-black-gold palette · Wear stacked or separately
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Red Jasper beads, Howlite beads, Black Obsidian beads, gold-toned and dark metallic spacer accents, elastic stretch cord.
metafields.care_or_directions: Slip on gently over the hand — do not over-stretch the cord. Keep away from perfume, water and harsh chemicals to protect the finish. Wipe with a soft dry cloth and store flat, away from direct sunlight.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: How many bracelets are in the set?
faqs.a: You receive a set of three coordinated crystal bracelets, each with its own arrangement of Red Jasper, Howlite and Black Obsidian beads.

faqs.q: Which crystals are used and what do they represent?
faqs.a: Red Jasper is traditionally linked with strength and stability, Howlite with calm and patience, and Black Obsidian with grounding and protection. These meanings are based on traditional beliefs, not medical claims.
Yes — the bracelets use a flexible stretch cord with a slip-on design, so they comfortably fit most wrist sizes without any clasp.

faqs.q: Can I wear the bracelets separately?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Stack all three together for a bold look, or wear any one on its own according to your mood and intention.

faqs.q: Is it suitable for both men and women?
faqs.a: Yes. The red, white, black and gold palette is deliberately unisex and styles easily for anyone.

faqs.q: How do I care for the bracelets?
faqs.a: Keep them away from water, perfume and chemicals, wipe with a soft dry cloth, and avoid over-stretching the cord to keep the beads and finish looking their best.

page_blocks.subtitle: Strength | Calm | Protection
page_blocks.product_brief: The Tri Power Bracelet is a coordinated set of three crystal bracelets — bold Red Jasper, calming Howlite and glossy Black Obsidian — finished with polished metallic spacers. Each bracelet carries its own arrangement, so you can wear the full stack or style each one on its own. Together they represent balanced power: strength to move forward, calm to think clearly and grounding to stay steady.
page_blocks.what_we_put_in:
✦ Red Jasper Beads – rich red stones traditionally linked with grounding, courage and inner strength
✦ Howlite Beads – white beads with soft grey marbling, associated with patience and a calm, balanced mindset
✦ Black Obsidian Beads – glossy black stones that add depth and contrast, tied to protection and grounding
✦ Metallic Spacer Accents – gold-toned and dark spacers that separate the beads and add a premium finish
✦ Textured Centre Accent – a detailed dark centre bead on one bracelet for a stronger statement look
✦ Flexible Stretch Cord – elastic construction that slides on comfortably with no clasp needed
page_blocks.product_benefits:
✨ Encourages Inner Strength
Red Jasper is traditionally associated with confidence, endurance and staying consistent.
✨ Supports a Calm Mindset
Howlite represents patience and a more thoughtful response to stressful moments.
✨ Promotes Grounding and Protection
Black Obsidian is worn as a symbolic shield from negativity and draining surroundings.
✨ Creates Balanced Energy
The three-crystal combination represents strength without aggression and calm without passivity.
✨ Offers Multiple Styling Options
Wear all three together, pick one by intention, or create a two-bracelet stack.
✨ Adds a Bold Colour Statement
The red, white and black tones lift everyday outfits without feeling heavy.
page_blocks.product_details:
Base Metal: Alloy spacer accents
Colour: Red, White, Black & Gold
Stones: Red Jasper, Howlite, Black Obsidian
Finish: Polished beads with metallic spacers
Construction: Elastic stretch cord (slip-on)
Set: 3 bracelets
detail_points: 🔴 Three-in-one set — Red Jasper, Howlite & Black Obsidian in one coordinated trio
🖐️ Slip-on stretch fit that slides on comfortably with no clasp
⚖️ Bold unisex red-white-black-gold palette that styles with anything
🎁 Wear stacked or separately — an easy, meaningful gifting choice
page_blocks.product_specification:
Product Name: Tri Power Bracelet – Set of 3
Design: Coordinated crystal bead trio with metallic spacers
Material: Red Jasper, Howlite & Black Obsidian beads, metallic spacer accents, elastic cord
Net Quantity: 3 bracelets
Country of Origin: India
page_blocks.how_to_use:
1. Slip each bracelet gently over your hand — avoid over-stretching the cord.
2. Wear all three together for a bold stack, or choose one by your intention.
3. Keep away from water, perfume and chemicals, and wipe with a soft dry cloth after wear.
